final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original digital art illustration of a deep-sea fantasy world with ancient underwater ruins.

Style/medium: digital painting with rich fantasy illustration style, detailed fantasy concept art
Composition: wide establishing shot, eye-level perspective, balanced arrangement with ruins spreading across the frame and mermaid princess as focal center
Subject: mermaid princess in ancient attire examining a mysterious rune-inscribed stone tablet at center; giant bioluminescent jellyfish emitting blue-purple glow; transparent deep-sea fish with self-illuminating organs; giant octopus tentacles reaching from darkness in background
Scene/backdrop: ancient civilization ruins at thousands of meters deep, massive stone columns and arches covered in coral and sea anemones, bioluminescent glow illuminating the ruins
Lighting/mood: bioluminescent light sources creating ethereal glow, deep blue-black ambient darkness punctuated by glowing organisms, mysterious and dreamlike atmosphere
Color palette: deep blue-black as base, bioluminescent accents in cyan-green, purple, and golden light points, creating contrast between darkness and ethereal glow
Materials/textures: weathered ancient stone with coral overgrowth, translucent jellyfish bells, iridescent fish scales, smooth stone tablet with carved runes
Avoid: cartoonish style, oversaturated colors, flat lighting, deformed anatomy, generic fantasy clichés, 8K stuffer terms
